chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, MIRPURKHAS C.P. No.D-153 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of M.A. No. 556/2026 3. For hearing of main case 11.03.2026 Mr. Girdhari Lal, Advocate along with petitioners Respondent No.5 Ali Ahmed present in person Mr. Ayaz Ali Rajpar, AAG along with I.O. SIP Muhammad Ashraf Ghouri, PS Pithoro Mr. Dhani Bux Mari, DPG ------ Both the Petitioners are present in Court along with their Counsel. Petitioner No.2 Mst Zahidan has stated that she has contracted marriage with petitioner No.1 out of her own volition, free from coercion or pressure but against wishes of her parents/relatives hence being annoyed Respondent No.5 has lodged subject F.I.R. on false allegation that she has been abducted by petitioner No.1, who is her husband. Pursuant to Order dated 25.02.2026, I.O./SIP Muhammad Ashraf Ghouri, PS Pithoro is in attendance. He has recorded statement of Petitioner No.2 Mst. Zahidan wherein she has reiterated the above facts. The I.O. submits that he will submit a report in the light of such statement before the learned Magistrate concerned within seven days. Petitioners and their counsel are satisfied and seek disposal of the petition in the said terms. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of in the above terms along with listed application. However, if the report is submitted by the I.O. before the learned Magistrate concerned, he shall pass appropriate orders on said report in the light of recommendation of the I.O. in accordance with law. The I.O. present today is directed to provide protection to the petitioners according to law.

However, if the report is submitted by the I.O. before the learned Magistrate concerned, he shall pass appropriate orders on said report in the light of recommendation of the I.O. in accordance with law. The I.O. present today is directed to provide protection to the petitioners according to law. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
